sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n60531" key="kubiti/zw" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">κῠβῐτίζω</orth>, (<etym lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="etym">κύβιτον</etym>) <sense id="n60531.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">nudge</tr_> or <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">poke with the elbow</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0521.tlg001:213" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Epich.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">213</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
